name: bible-sidecar-plus
description: This is a sample plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md)

scripts.test: node -e "require('esbuild').buildSync({ entryPoints: ['run-tests.ts'], outfile: 'run-tests.tmp.js', bundle: true, platform: 'node', external: ['obsidian'] }); require('./run-tests.tmp.js'); require('fs').unlinkSync('./run-tests.tmp.js');"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json
